title: How To Play Bank Stocks Now That Interest Rates Are Rising
text: Bank stocks have underperformed since Russia launched its invasion of Ukraine in late February. Despite the recent weakness, Bank of America analyst Ebrahim Poonawala said this week the interest rate environment is paying out even better than expected for big banks.

title: These banks stocks are a great pick amidst inflation and Ukraine war
text: The rising rate environment is broadly known to be good for the banks but not all banks were made equal, said KBW's Tom Michaud, as he suggested that investors be selective when picking stocks. Why regional banks are a better pick?

title: LawPay Launches New Nota by M&T Bank Integration to Streamline Cloud-Based Law Firm Management for Solo and Small Law Firms

title: M&T Bank (MTB) & People's United (PBCT) Announce Merger Date
text: Per M&T Bank (MTB) and People's United (PBCT), their impending merger is slated for a quick wrap-up following the Fed's recent regulatory nod. This will boost M&T Bank's base in the Northeast.

title: M&T Bank Corporation and People's United Financial, Inc. Announce Transaction Close Date for Merger
M&T Bank (MTB) & PBCT Merger Receives Green Light From Fed
text: The waiting game for the merger approval of M&T Bank (MTB) and People's United (PBCT) ends with the companies finally receiving Fed's nod.

title: M&T Bank Corporation Receives Regulatory Approval from the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System for Merger with People's United Financial, Inc.
text: BRIDGEPORT, Conn., March 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- People's United Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: PBCT) ("People's United") announced today receipt of regulatory approval from the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System to complete the previously announced acquisition of People's United by M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE: MTB) ("M&T").

title: M&T Bank Corporation Receives Regulatory Approval from the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System for People's United Merger
text: BUFFALO, N.Y., March 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE: MTB) ("M&T") announced today receipt of regulatory approval from the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System to complete the previously announced acquisition of People's United Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: PBCT) ("People's United").

title: M&T Bank CEO Calls for More FinTech Regulation
text: M&T Bank Corp CEO René Jones has made the case for holding digital banks to the same regulatory standards as traditional financial institutions (FIs). In his annual letter to shareholders, Jones said the growth of new, unregulated financial companies threaten regulatory protections such as the Community Reinvestment Act which was enacted to safeguard the most vulnerable.

title: M&T Bank CEO René Jones Speaks to the Impact of COVID, People's United Financial Merger and Industry Regulation in Annual Letter
text: BUFFALO, N.Y., March 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, M&T Bank Chairman and CEO René Jones released his letter to shareholders, an annual tradition featuring candid insights on the banking industry and the communities in which M&T operates.
